trn-custom-data.bytes: {"trn-annot-preview":". Secondly, Gucci already sells a wide range of\\nproducts in China, from clothing to home furnishings. Developing new\\nproducts would require an R&D cycle, and new services such as offline\\nrestaurants would also face the risk o"}

underline.name: 6212f902-01ea-441c-afe7-f553098fc4dc
underline.title: 小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁
underline.contents: in the online store (mini-program, Tmall and Gucci.cn) from July to August in 2022. Based on the fact that the share of luxury

underline.name: 9cdccfd3-f25f-4979-a8cd-5512b90dd1a3
underline.title: 小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁

underline.title: 小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁
underline.contents: It is about continuing the brand's classics and keeping up with the latest\n4

highlight.name: 34713D13-3808-4B76-9A58-74A75B77FF9A
highlight.title: 小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁

freetext.name: 24DA4614-ABBE-4C57-B861-168D8D61FA59
freetext.title: 小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁

stamp.name: 929503F8-0C8E-475B-9771-F1F47A424D28
stamp.title: 小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁小丁

underline.name: ac50aaf2-4d55-4879-ac43-8a089c2cd8ed
underline.title: 小丁
underline.contents: According to Gucci's revenue share for H1 2021 (Kering, 2021b) and Boston Consulting

underline.name: 3685282b-0128-41e4-941b-dbcf2c635fe8
underline.title: 小丁
underline.contents: Group Matrix (BCG, no date) (fig.2). Gucci jewellery in Question Mark could develop

strikeout.name: 96991beb-0c29-4e12-930b-e009758d2311
strikeout.title: 小丁
strikeout.contents: Cash Cow or Star. On the one hand, China is the world's largest market for luxury

squiggly.name: dfe2932e-8478-4cd1-87ff-53fd77c01eed
squiggly.title: 小丁
squiggly.contents: jewellery, having reached $6.3 billion (Statista, 2021d). And watches & jewellery

squiggly.name: 694B2018-9F6D-42E4-8003-47716FA24D73
squiggly.title: 小丁
squiggly.contents: s differentiated aesthetics, Italian craftsmanship, relatively premium prices, strong marketing strategies and omnichannel channel to penetrate the

underline.name: 79607F93-B929-4F15-994A-7683307DD8A5
underline.title: 小丁
underline.contents: tive approach to differentiate from its competitors (Kering, 2021a). Furthe

squiggly.name: 63B917A2-B17D-4827-B8C8-3582DF7BA0FB
squiggly.title: 小丁
squiggly.contents: y market is becoming "branded", "segmented", and e-commerce oriented (iiMed

highlight.name: 849CE4B5-A335-4843-9D53-4CC24EEDE906
highlight.title: 小丁
highlight.contents: ording to the current Gucci jewellery product segmentation (tbl. 1), there are four main demographics, and covering a wide range of wealth and age

underline.name: B45FFBD4-99B3-4903-B71B-E3269E3479B6
underline.title: 小丁
underline.contents: g mix needs to be differentiated and prioritised. Twothirds of Gucci's revenu

squiggly.name: 587726E7-D59A-4B8A-87ED-3355FCACF3E3
squiggly.title: 小丁
squiggly.contents: mes from Gen Z and Millennials, and Millennials are becoming increasingly loyal to

strikeout.name: 42007464-D4D4-41C4-A8A6-CDF134C2CA57
strikeout.title: 小丁
strikeout.contents: luxury market, with around 400 million people (Statista, 2020a). The average Gen Z

trn-custom-data.bytes: {"trn-annot-preview":"and \\"Gen Z\\" may become an opportunity and growth engine for the future"}

underline.name: 13fd5dee-3227-8bf3-be22-f68fba04c186
underline.title: 小丁
underline.subject: 下划线
